✅ Approved the contribution.
Comment: A good problem that requires you to think about the solution if you want to solve it quickly.

✅ Approved the contribution.
Comment: My solution (in Haskell):

import Data.Char

main :: IO ()
main = do
    items <- getLine

    print $ f items

f ii = sum $ (\(x,y) -> x*y) <$> fmap price <$> parse ii

parse :: String -> [(Int, Char)]
parse [] = []
parse s = (read $ takeWhile isDigit s, head rest) : parse (drop 1 rest)
    where rest = dropWhile isDigit s

price :: Char -> Int
price c = case c of
    'S' -> 1200
    's' -> 508
    'L' -> 157000
    'G' -> 1000
    'E' -> 12200
    'H' -> 469
    'B' -> 337
    'k' -> 10

Inspired by the following short by Sam Reich (Dropout CEO and Game Changer & Make some noise host):
https://www.youtube.com/shorts/s_vWJdp0Ydo
Modified on request from @5DN1L to adopt a more RPG, cartoonish style, instead of the original organ trafficking theme. Sorry about that. ^^'
